messages.body: Hi Valery, Hope you’re doing well. We have already cancelled your subscription with us!

Valery, we completely understand your frustration and apologize for the inconvenience this has caused. We will be processing the cancellation and account deletion immediately.   I have asked my finance team to ensure you…
I took screenshots of the multiple conversations i asked to remove the subscription im deleting the account and if i get charged next month i have evidence that you guys are not cooperating with me.
I realky just want my account deleted. I already spoke to raj about it.

Hi Valery, I completely understand your decision and appreciate you letting me know.  Before we move forward with the cancellation, could you please share if there’s anything specific that hasn’t been working well? I’d l…
Hi when you get back i been trying to deactivate my subscription since last week and delete my account. I have told raj multiple times and again no response.

Hi Valery, I hope you’re doing well!  I just wanted to share a quick update — we’re celebrating a major Indian festival Diwali, and our team will be on leave from October 18th to 22nd. During this time, I may not be able…

Hey Valery,  This is Shikha, your Account Manager at Zoca.😊 Would love to hop on a quick call and get to know you better, and also walk you through how we can make things smoother for your business. Please let me know yo…
